title: International Paper (IP) Aims to Sell its Stake in Russian Ilim JV

title: Jim Cramer says these 10 high-yielding dividend stocks should be on your shopping list
text: "This indiscriminate selling has created many stocks with absurdly high yields that also happen to be dirt-cheap on an earnings basis," Cramer said Wednesday.
